creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
"Brent J. Nordquist" <brent@nordist.net> writes:

> On Tue, 23 Jan 2001, Cyrille Lefevre wrote:
> 
> > >Submitter-Id:   current-users
> > >Originator:     Cyrille Lefevre
> > >Organization:   ACME
> > >Confidential:   no
> > >Synopsis:       Updated port: databases/gdbm - 1.8.0
> 
> Hello Cyrille,
> 
> I haven't been involved with FreeBSD for some time.  I don't know how this
> new process works, but I'll repeat what I've told others when they've
> asked about my ports:  you are welcome to become the maintainer for this
> port if you would like, as far as I'm concerned.

not a problem for me to be the maintainer for this port.

> > -Port to FreeBSD 2.1 by
> > -Brent J. Nordquist <bjn@visi.com>
> > -Mon Apr  8 06:27:31  1996
> 
> Wow, time flies, doesn't it?  :-)

you're right.

PS: this mail is sent to -gnats-submit to record the fact you wish
release the maintainership of this port to someone else. in the case
I don't get the maintainership of this port, you'll not be disturbed
anymore since the port will be affected to ports@FreeBSD.org. FYI,
you are always recorded as the maintainership of the following ports:
astro/sattrack, converters/btoa, misc/viz, www/cgiwrap
I suggest you to send an email to ports@FreeBSD.org if you also want
to release the maintainership of these ports.

Cyrille.
--
